_publications._publicationTitle: Electrical stimulation of Schwann cells on electrospun hyaluronic acid carbon nanotube fibers.

_contextSnippet: NF SC has a higher aspect ratio than WT SC. NF SC on HA collagen has significantly higher aspect ratio than no collagen conditions
details: NF SC has significantly higher aspect ratio than WT SC, with NF SC on HA collagen having significantly higher aspect ratio than no collagen conditions
